word: G1513 - εἴ πως - eí pōs - i poce - If by any means

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἴπως

- Transliteration: Ei pos

- Phonetic: i poce

- Definition:

1. if indeed, since, if after all

- Origin: from G1487 and G4458

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: From G1487 and G4458; if somehow: - if by any means.
